meaning: n.萨巴特克人[语]adj.萨巴特克人[语]的
examples: The Zapotec civilisation of Oaxaca undoubtedly had writing.
But the Zapotec also played a vital role in ancient Mesoamerica.
Scholarshave been able to work out the Zapotec calendar and show it to be aprecursor of the Mayan one.
My kids speak Zapotec, but I don't - they learned it off their grandparents while I was away.
The coalition set up a Zapotec radio station and literacy campaign before being thrown out of office by Mexico's then ruling party, the PRI, two years later.
